query:
ALTER TABLE billing_visit_events ADD COLUMN signed_at TIMESTAMP NULL DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Data real da assinatura do laudo - base para filtros de ciclo financeiro';
UPDATE billing_visit_events SET signed_at = createdAt WHERE signed_at IS NULL;
